title: FrontmatterNote
description: Frontmatter shape for nodes classified as `note` by the Claude Provider. Extends the spec's universal `frontmatter/base.schema.json` via $ref-by-$id with no additional fields. Exists so that every kind has a matching schema for uniform routing. Owned by the Claude Provider; relocated from `spec/schemas/frontmatter/` in spec 0.8.0 (Phase 3 of plug-in model overhaul).
